headline: Carrier Global and AAON Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after investors reacted to the news that Israel and Lebanon might enter direct negotiations, further supporting the fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire.
